function.name: enterprise_values_for_enterprise_values
function.description: This is the subfunction for tool "enterprise_values", you can use this tool. The description of this function is: "Financial Modeling Prep (FMP) is a leading provider of comprehensive data solutions. Our mission is to empower investment professionals with real-time and historical market data, reliable APIs, and a range of powerful tools to enhance their decision-making"

function.name: Finish
function.description: If you believe that you have obtained a result that can answer the task, please call this function to provide the final answer. Alternatively, if you recognize that you are unable to proceed with the task in the current state, call this function to restart. Remember: you must ALWAYS call this function at the end of your attempt, and the only part that will be shown to the user is the final answer, so it should contain sufficient information.

final_answer.description: The final answer you want to give the user. You should have this field if "return_type"=="give_answer"

answer_generation.query: Please retrieve the enterprise value data for AAPL with period=quarter. Then summarize the most recent values and describe the overall trend across the returned quarters (e.g., increasing, decreasing, volatile). If multiple entries are returned, also report the latest enterpriseValue and the corresponding date.
